title: ranunculus cassubicus subsp. elatior
intro: Ranunculus cassubicus subsp. elatior, also known as greater buttercup, is a perennial plant species native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its potential use in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its content of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus cassubicus subsp. elatior include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, although caution should be taken due to its toxic nature and potential side effects.
